arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Bristol City Live: Start time, TV channel, team news and score updates
arts.sum: Follow live updates from the Cardiff City Stadium as the Bluebirds take on Bristol City in the Severnside Derby

arts.ttl: Bristol City predicted team vs Cardiff as Manning looks to secure first Severnside derby win
arts.sum: Liam Manning's Robins are looking to secure back-to-back Championship wins for only the second time this season when they face the Bluebirds at the Cardiff City Stadium on Saturday. Wednesday night was both defenders' best game in a few weeks and Manning will be hoping this is the start of a good run of form for both players between now and the end of the Championship season.

arts.ttl: Bristol City team news ahead of Cardiff City as Liam Manning shares Cam Pring injury update
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted Bristol City's clash with Cardiff City will likely come too early for Cam Pring to return from injury, with the tight turnaround between games limiting the defender's training time. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: ‘Potentially’ – Omer Riza leaves door open to ’emergency’ Cardiff City free agent signing

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth-round TV schedule announced as BBC and ITV both get huge matches
arts.sum: Kick-off times and TV schedules for the eight FA Cup fifth-round matches have been confirmed, with holders Manchester United and 2023 winner Manchester City both involved

arts.ttl: Sinclair Armstrong: Bristol City forward on faith, injury recovery and 'The Veteran' Nahki Wells
arts.sum: Having returned from the sidelines off of the bench in the Reds' 1-0 defeat to Coventry City at the CBS Arena, Armstrong made his first start in over a month when Manning's side welcomed Blackburn Rovers to Ashton Gate in their final game of January. After speaking to Sinclair Armstrong in the wake of Bristol City's win over Stoke City, two things became very obvious about the striker - his desire to improve at Ashton Gate and the importance his faith plays in his career.

arts.ttl: Bristol City moments missed, Ashton Gate Eight tribute and defender's good day vs Stoke City
arts.sum: In the absence of McNally, the City vice captain was also a threat from set-pieces, heading Scott Twine’s free-kick just wide after 49 minutes before playing a key role in the second of Mehmeti’s goals. On Wednesday night, it was nearly a fourth foul that resulted in a goal for the striker after 48 minutes, when he carried the ball from deep into the City half, got himself out of a tackle from Michael Rose and sprinted away before unleashing Mehmeti wide, who won a foul.

Away supporters will not be able to travel along Sloper Road in the direction of Leckwith Road during this period. Cardiff City fans will be unable to travel along Sloper Road in the direction of Penarth Road during this period.

arts.ttl: Bristol City quality clear but consistency test next up after Stoke win
arts.sum: While most suggested the defeat to Luke Williams' side had all but ended City's top-six hopes just a matter of days ago, the chaotic nature of the Championship means that one win has well and truly thrust the Reds right back into the mix. Anis Mehmeti's brace had given the Robins a 2-0 lead, which the Potters never looked like coming back from and the home support enjoyed one of their most routine wins of the campaign.
